Notice Of Motion And Plaintiffs' Motion To Augment Plaintiffs' Expert Disclosure
Off Calendar Oct-20-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Mark Hooshmand 415-318-5709 of Hooshmand Law Group appearing via Zoom for plaintiff.
Joseph O'Neil 415-939-5330 of Mcnamara Ambacher Wheeler Hirsig & Gray LLP appearing via Zoom for defendant.
Reporter: Deborah Fuqua; CSR# 12948; 415-810-7070; dfuquaCSR@gmail.com

Hearing held (See reporter's transcript for full details). Tentative ruling: Hearing Required. No later than 9:00 a.m. on October 20, 2023 Plaintiff to submit a declaration by Mr. Seemann limited to the following: the date Mr. Seemann considers to have been retained.
Declaration filed and submitted as instructed by the court. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF MARIA POTAMOUSIS, ANNA POTAMOUSI Notice Of Motion And Plaintiffs' Motion To Augment Plaintiffs' Expert Disclosure is GRANTED.

Judge: Charles F. Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ;Reported: Deborah Fuqua; CSR# 12948; 415-810-7070; dfuquaCSR@gmail.com (D501)
